name: Pleasant Financial Services
description_short: Chicago-based credit repair firm offering personal credit disputes, business credit building, tax services, and DIY financial tools led by CEO Sherise Pleasant.
description_long:
Pleasant Financial Services is a Chicago-based financial services company founded and led by CEO Sherise Pleasant. The company operates from a single location in the South Side of Chicago and positions itself as a comprehensive financial solutions provider rather than a single-service credit repair shop. The business maintains limited operating hours (Tuesday-Wednesday 9am-5pm, Thursday-Friday 9am-3pm, closed Saturday-Monday), suggesting a small, owner-operated model.

The company offers a diverse range of services spanning personal credit repair, business credit and funding solutions, tax preparation and filing (both personal and business), financial literacy classes and webinars, and a library of downloadable DIY resources. Their service offerings include credit score restoration, dispute letter packages, hard inquiry removal assistance, and various educational eBooks priced from free to $197. They promote a free discovery call to assess client financial situations and offer no-cost resources like their "3 Bureau 24 Hour Express Inquiries Deletion Packet."

What distinguishes Pleasant Financial Services is their multi-service approach combining credit repair with tax preparation, business credit development, and educational resources. Rather than focusing solely on disputing negative items, they emphasize financial literacy and provide DIY tools alongside their done-for-you services. The company's marketing emphasizes manifestation principles and wealth-building philosophy, with CEO messaging focused on long-term financial transformation rather than quick fixes.

Honest assessment: This is a legitimate small business operating within the credit repair industry, but prospects should note their very limited hours, single physical location, and lack of transparent pricing for core credit repair services on the website. Customer testimonials are minimal (one review visible), and there's no information about typical timelines, success rates, or dispute methodology. The emphasis on DIY resources and eBooks alongside professional services suggests clients may handle portions of their own credit repair. The company appears to serve a local Chicago market primarily.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Offers free discovery call and free resources (inquiry deletion packet, business guide eBook) with no upfront cost required
Multi-service model includes tax preparation, business credit, and financial literacy classes beyond basic credit repair
Provides DIY tools and eBooks ($0-$197) allowing customers to take action independently if preferred
Local Chicago-based business with physical office location and direct phone contact (773-701-6860)
Owner-operated by CEO Sherise Pleasant with visible leadership and personal brand attached to services
Offers business credit solutions alongside personal credit repair, serving entrepreneurs and small business owners
cons: Very limited operating hours (closed weekends and Mondays; only 3pm closing Thursday-Friday) limit accessibility for working consumers
No pricing transparency for core credit repair services on website—only DIY products have listed prices
Minimal social proof with only one customer testimonial visible; no reviews, ratings, or success metrics disclosed
No information about typical dispute timelines, success rates, or credit score improvement guarantees
Single location in Chicago limits service accessibility for non-local customers despite having a website
best_for: Chicago-area consumers seeking combined credit repair and tax preparation services from a local provider
Small business owners and entrepreneurs needing both personal credit restoration and business credit development
Self-directed consumers interested in DIY credit repair tools and educational resources with optional professional support
Clients seeking owner-operated, personalized service from a small business rather than large national credit repair chains
diagnosis: Pleasant Financial Services is best for Chicago-area consumers and small business owners seeking personalized credit repair combined with tax services and financial education. The main caveat is the lack of transparent pricing, limited customer reviews, restricted operating hours, and absence of documented success metrics or timeline guarantees—making it essential to discuss specific costs and expectations during the free discovery call before committing to paid services.
services: Personal credit repair and score restoration
Hard inquiry and inquiry removal assistance
DIY eBooks and downloadable resources (credit building, business funding, dispute templates)
3 Bureau 24 Hour Express Inquiries Deletion Packet (free)
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 9415 S Western Ave Suite 109, Chicago, IL 60643
